treatment_information.treatment_response: Remained relapse-free during the trials but developed systemic, non-specific symptoms leading to diagnosis of sarcoidosis
No effect on the non-productive cough
No effect on the non-productive cough

treatment_timeline.event: Started daclizumab monotherapy for Relapsing Remitting Multiple Sclerosis (RRMS)
Developed fevers, night sweats, and non-productive cough after 79 months of daclizumab therapy
Daclizumab was suspended pending further investigation
Diagnosed with sarcoidosis based on lymph node aspirate showing non-necrotising granulomatous inflammation
Commenced inhaled corticosteroids followed by a short trial of oral corticosteroids
CT-PET demonstrated reduction in lymph node uptake

patient_outcome.final_status: Improved with resolution of all symptoms except non-productive cough
patient_outcome.recovery_timeline: Symptoms resolved two months following daclizumab cessation except for non-productive cough
